components.name: 4. 轻柔混匀，室温 1–2 min (勿超 3 min)
5. 加入血球计数板 / 自动计数仪
6. 计数: 活细胞 (透明) vs 死细胞 (蓝色)

notes.en: Cell density = average cells per large square × dilution factor × 10⁴ cells/mL. Viability = live / (live + dead) × 100%. Staining beyond 3 min causes false positives (live cells begin to take up dye). Dilute further if concentration is too high.
notes.zh: 细胞密度 = 平均每大格细胞数 × 稀释倍数 × 10⁴ cells/mL。活率 = 活细胞/(活+死) × 100%。染色时间 >3 min 会导致假阳性 (活细胞也着色)。如浓度过高，进一步稀释后重新计数。

briefSteps.en: Collect and mix cell suspension → add equal volume 0.4% trypan blue → mix and incubate 1–2 min → load onto hemocytometer or automated counter → count live (clear) and dead (blue) cells → calculate concentration and viability
briefSteps.zh: 收集混匀细胞悬液 → 等体积 0.4% 台盼蓝混合 → 混匀室温 1–2 min → 加入血球计数板或自动计数仪 → 计数活细胞（透明）和死细胞（蓝色）→ 计算浓度和活率

detailedSteps.en: Collect the cell suspension (from trypsinized culture or existing suspension) and mix thoroughly by gentle pipetting to ensure a homogeneous single-cell suspension.
detailedSteps.zh: 收集细胞悬液（来自胰酶消化或已有的悬浮培养），轻柔吹打充分混匀，确保均匀单细胞悬液。

detailedSteps.en: If cell concentration is expected to be high (>5×10⁶/mL), dilute the suspension in complete medium first; note the additional dilution factor.
detailedSteps.zh: 若细胞浓度估计较高（>5×10⁶/mL），先用完全培养基稀释，记录稀释倍数。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer 10 µL of cell suspension to a microcentrifuge tube; add 10 µL of 0.4% trypan blue solution (1:1 dilution factor = 2).
detailedSteps.zh: 取 10 µL 细胞悬液至微量离心管，加入 10 µL 0.4% 台盼蓝溶液（1:1 混合，稀释因子 = 2）。

detailedSteps.en: Mix gently by pipetting 2–3 times; incubate at room temperature for 1–2 min. Do not exceed 3 min or live cells may begin to take up dye.
detailedSteps.zh: 轻柔吹打 2–3 次混匀，室温孵育 1–2 min，不超过 3 min（否则活细胞也会着色）。

detailedSteps.en: Load 10 µL of the trypan blue–cell mixture onto a hemocytometer (under coverslip) or insert a counting slide into an automated cell counter.
detailedSteps.zh: 取 10 µL 台盼蓝-细胞混合液加入血球计数板（盖玻片下）或插入自动计数仪计数槽。

detailedSteps.en: Under 10× objective, identify live cells (round, bright/clear, intact membrane) and dead cells (blue-stained, often shrunken or irregular).
detailedSteps.zh: 在 10× 物镜下区分活细胞（圆形、亮透明、膜完整）和死细胞（蓝色染色，常皱缩或不规则）。

detailedSteps.en: Count cells in 4 large corner squares of the hemocytometer (or use automated counter readout); aim for 100–200 cells per square for accuracy.
detailedSteps.zh: 计数血球计数板四个角大方格中的细胞（或使用自动计数仪读数），每格理想计数 100–200 个细胞以确保准确性。

detailedSteps.en: Calculate cell concentration: cells/mL = (average cells per large square) × dilution factor × 10⁴.
detailedSteps.zh: 计算细胞浓度：细胞数/mL = 每大格平均细胞数 × 稀释因子 × 10⁴。

detailedSteps.en: Calculate viability: viability (%) = live cells ÷ (live + dead cells) × 100. Record results for your lab notebook.
detailedSteps.zh: 计算活率（%）= 活细胞数 ÷（活 + 死细胞数）× 100，记录结果于实验记录本。

note.en: Cell suspension aliquot can be kept at RT briefly before trypan blue staining; do not exceed 30 min
note.zh: 细胞悬液取样后可室温短暂放置再染色；不超过 30 min

usage.en: Assess cell viability and count cells using trypan blue dye exclusion.
usage.zh: 台盼蓝排斥法评估细胞活力和计数。
